editionStmt.edition: Version 1.0, published on 02.05.2021, archived on the University of Birmingham eData repository on 13.5.2024.

publisher.name: The International Greek New Testament Project (IGNTP)

availability.p: Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) Available for re-use under a creative commons license provided attribution is made to the original creators.

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the INTF and converted into XML by ITSEE. It was published online in the NTVMR in 2017.

editorialDecl.p: The XML specifications used are version 1.6 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Corrector hands attributed based on Lyon 1959 (and cross-checked with NA29) by Hugh Houghton.
Downloaded from NTVMR and initial adjustments in encoding made for inclusion in ECM by Hugh Houghton.

ab.note: This correction is not observed by Lyon.
Although Tischendorf states that δια had been erased, Lyon is adamant that it was not, and it is simply obscured by the applied chemicals.
Lyon believes that corrector 3 changed χω to κω, but this is not visible on the current image.
